response.step_by_step_log: 1. Visual analysis: Confirmed the character is Mori Calliope from Hololive. 2. Audio recognition: Identified the song as "GETCHA!" by Giga and KIRA. 3. Web Search: Used search string "GETCHA!" Giga KIRA Japanese and English lyrics to find accurate bilingual lyrics. 4. Data processing: Compiled the lyrics and metadata into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A single continuous video segment featuring a static image of Mori Calliope performing a cover of the song "GETCHA!".

scenes.description: A static image of Mori Calliope singing "GETCHA!".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
幾つの苦も美観主義
愛の反戦一人じゃんけん
運命と縛り見ない振り
それも暗転
Now I know all about you, babe
I don't want the handbags, the money, or the diamond rings
'Cause guys like you they all don't care about the little things
まぁ anyway 吹っ切れた訳で
棒に当たって吠えたって圏外です
I'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back around, around, around again
Now I'll go higher and I'll go higher
And you couldn't take me down if you tried
ばら撒いてた愛取返し撤退だ
Now I can finally open my eyes
そんで来世もっかい君への返品サイン
Getcha out my life boy
I'll getcha, getcha, getcha!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
How many pains of aestheticism
A love rock-paper-scissors, playing alone
Pretending not to see fate and restrictions
That too, turns dark
Now I know all about you, babe
I don't want the handbags, the money, or the diamond rings
'Cause guys like you they all don't care about the little things
Well, anyway, I think I got over this
Barking after hitting a dead end is out of the question
I'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back around, around, around again
Now I'll go higher and I'll go higher
And you couldn't take me down if you tried
Taking back the love I showered over you and retreating
Now I can finally open my eyes
And then, a return sign for you in my next life
Getcha out of my life, boy
I'll getcha, getcha, getcha!
